PEDIATRIC CARE

Growth & Development Monitoring

Comprehensive tracking of your child's physical growth and developmental milestones from infancy through adolescence, ensuring a healthy foundation for life.

RegularMilestone Checks

Growth Charts

Timely developmental screening

Early Intervention

WHY MONITORING MATTERS

Nurturing Healthy Development

Consistent tracking ensures your child is reaching their full potential physically, mentally, and socially.

The early years of a child's life are marked by rapid physical growth and significant developmental changes. Regular monitoring by an experienced pediatrician like Dr. Sanjay D Swamy is crucial to ensure these processes are on track.

We use standardized growth charts to track height, weight, and BMI, allowing us to identify patterns and potential issues like growth faltering or excessive weight gain early on.

Beyond physical growth, we conduct comprehensive developmental screenings to assess motor skills, language acquisition, and social-emotional behavior, enabling timely intervention if any delays are detected.

Benefits of Regular Checks

  • Comprehensive assessment
  • Early detection of issues
  • Expert nutritional advice
  • Long-term health tracking
  • Parental support and guidance
  • Tailored intervention plans

WHAT WE DO

Our Monitoring Services

A comprehensive approach to tracking and supporting your child's well-being.

Physical Growth Tracking

Regular measurement of height, weight, and head circumference plotted on standardized growth charts.

Developmental Screening

Comprehensive assessment of motor, language, cognitive, and social-emotional milestones.

Routine Checkups

Scheduled well-child visits to monitor overall health and address parental concerns.

Nutritional Guidance

Expert advice on feeding practices, age-appropriate diets, and managing nutritional deficiencies.

Behavioral Assessment

Evaluation and support for behavioral challenges, sleep issues, and school readiness.

Early Intervention

Prompt identification and intervention strategies for any detected developmental delays.

Time for a well-child visit?

Schedule a routine checkup to ensure your child's milestones are on track.

HOW WE MONITOR

Evaluation Methods

Employing evidence-based practices for accurate assessment of your child's progress.

01

Standardized Tools

Using globally recognized growth charts and developmental screening questionnaires.

02

Thorough physical and developmental examinations by an experienced pediatrician.

03

Personalized Plans

Tailored guidance and intervention strategies based on your child's unique needs.

04

Long-term Tracking

Continuous monitoring of progress from infancy through adolescence.

Concerned about a milestone?

Don't wait. Early evaluation is key to successful intervention.

Schedule Assessment Call Now

FAQ

Common Questions About Development

How often should my child's growth be checked?

Frequent checkups are recommended in the first year (e.g., at 1, 2, 4, 6, 9, and 12 months), followed by regular visits at 15, 18, 24, 30 months, and then annually.

What happens during a developmental screening?

We use standardized questionnaires and observation to assess your child's gross and fine motor skills, language, cognitive abilities, and social interaction.

What if my child is not meeting milestones?

Every child develops at their own pace. If a delay is identified, we will discuss early intervention strategies, additional testing, or specialist referrals as needed.

Are growth charts different for boys and girls?

Yes, we use gender-specific growth charts, typically from the WHO for children under 2 and the CDC or IAP for older children.

What should I bring to a well-child visit?

Please bring your child's health records, vaccination card, and any questions or concerns you have about their growth, behavior, or nutrition.

Can you help with my child's picky eating?

Absolutely. We provide tailored nutritional counseling to address picky eating and ensure your child receives adequate nutrients for healthy growth.
